title: Teaching layer: purpose-first narration and intent-carrying dispatch descriptions
read_first: skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md (rules 11 and 13 - the template AGENTS.md renders from)
skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs:1869-1870 (doc-coverage assertion whose sentence must stay intact)
action: Per work-visibility D1/D2 (decision 4439bd7e). (1) routing-and-contracts.md Silent Bookkeeping (:185-194): keep every existing sentence including the strip-bee-terms litmus verbatim; append a 'Purpose-first narration' paragraph - silence about mechanics is never silence about purpose; every perceivable work unit (phase of real work starting, worker sent out, long-running step, direction change) opens with ONE work-language sentence naming what is being done and for what outcome; twin litmus: strip the message entirely - if the user loses the thread of what/why, the sentence was owed. (2) Delegation contract transport paragraph (:270): extend 'model name in the Agent description' to 'one work-language intent sentence of what the worker will find/build/check, plus the model name, in the Agent description' - a description that is only a model name or codename is a red flag; keep the sentence shape test_misc.mjs:1869-1870 asserts (transport rule wording: model param or anchored [bee-tier: <tier>] marker (decision 0023)) intact. (3) AGENTS.block.md: rule 11 line gains the positive-duty clause (purpose-first, one sentence per work unit); rule 13 transport wording gains the intent-sentence-in-description clause; Working files section: add timings.jsonl next to logs/hooks.jsonl. (4) NEVER hand-edit AGENTS.md - regen INSIDE this cell, in order: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write. Diff-check the rendered AGENTS.md. Verify: test_misc.mjs green (doc-coverage), grep 'Purpose-first' present in routing-and-contracts.md and AGENTS.md, release manifest check green.

truths: transport-rule sentence asserted by test_misc.mjs stays intact

purpose-first duty + twin litmus stated in both routing-and-contracts.md and AGENTS.md
dispatch-description intent clause stated in Delegation contract and rule 13
release manifest regenerated and check green
